title: Innoteck 4-Piece Round Glass Food Storage Container Set with Snap-Lock Airtight Lids – Watertight, Heat & Cold Resistant, Microwave, Oven, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe
features: DURABLE GLASS CONSTRUCTION: Made from premium, heat-resistant glass designed for long-term kitchen use. Each container features a strong snap-lock lid with a rubber gasket for airtight and leakproof sealing, ideal for storing, preserving and transporting food.

STYLISH & PRACTICAL STORAGE SOLUTION: A versatile 4-piece set suitable for everyday meal prep, leftovers, snacks and pantry ingredients. The clear glass design allows easy visibility of contents without opening the lid, making kitchen organisation effortless.
SPACE-SAVING STACKABLE DESIGN: Features concave lids for secure stacking in cupboards, freezers or fridges. Maximises space on countertops and shelves while keeping food fresh, dry and neatly stored.

CONVENIENT & MULTI-PURPOSE USAGE: The glass bases are safe for use in the oven, microwave, freezer and dishwasher. Ideal for reheating, baking, chilling or storing meals. Perfect for lunches, leftovers, snacks, salads, fruit, nuts, sauces and more.

PERFECT GIFT CHOICE FOR ANY OCCASION: A practical and long-lasting gift for housewarmings, birthdays, weddings, Christmas or everyday use. Also works as an eco-friendly lunch box option. A complete solution for meal prep, batch cooking and organised food storage.
description: From the brand Previous page Innovation, Quality & Trust. Since 2012, Innoteck has been enhancing UK homes with practical, design-led solutions for seamless everyday living. Our kitchen and home essentials are tailored to UK spaces, bringing ease and comfort to daily routines. Serving over 5 million UK households, we focus on forward-thinking design, premium craftsmanship, and reliability, with friendly UK-based support to help you cook with care and enjoy your home. Shop Bestsellers Visit the store Shop Kitchen Appliances Visit the store Shop Home & Kitchen Essentials Visit the store How did we start? We began in 2012 with electrical home solutions and expanded into innovative kitchen essentials in 2020 – making UK homes stylish, practical and easier to live in. What makes our products unique? We listen to what UK households need – designing smarter appliances and homeware with features inspired by real-life feedback, not just trends. Why trust us? We test our products in the UK to ensure they meet the highest safety and quality standards, because your home deserves products we’d use in ours. Next page
